title: Tangy Tofu Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with crispy tofu and a tangy sweet sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute until fragrant.
3. Add the mixed bell peppers and snow peas, and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until tender.
4. Crumble the tofu into small pieces and add to the skillet.
5. Stir in the honey and soy sauce, and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the tofu is coated.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve the tangy tofu stir-fry hot over rice or noodles.
8. Garnish with sesame seeds and chopped scallions, if desired.
